evidence: cornerstone namespace promote --source-kind memory --source-id <memory_id> --target-owner-id local-org --target-namespace-id organization --target-workspace-id ops --json
scenario_results.notes: Explicit memory promotion creates an organization-scoped copy with source provenance, source evidence refs, policy decision refs, and audit refs.
Local deterministic access matrix covers roles, attributes, namespace, classification, mission authority, policy allow/deny decisions, and audit refs.

evidence: cornerstone memory answer --question <question> --owner-id local-org --namespace-id organization --workspace-id ops --json
scenario_results.notes: Organization memory answers use no personal memory before explicit promotion and use only the promoted organization-scoped memory after promotion.

org_admin_read_restricted_allowed.reason: Access is allowed by the local deterministic RBAC/ABAC matrix.
resolution_path: Proceed through the same scoped CLI path and audit ledger.

org_approver_approve_allowed.reason: Access is allowed by the local deterministic RBAC/ABAC matrix.
resolution_path: Proceed through the same scoped CLI path and audit ledger.

org_member_configure_denied.reason: Policy or namespace configuration requires the org_admin role.
resolution_path: Ask an organization admin to configure the policy or grant the needed role.

org_member_execute_without_mission_denie.reason: Execution requires an active or approved Mission Goal Contract authority.
resolution_path: Activate or approve a Mission Goal Contract before execution.

resolution_path: Request restricted clearance or reduce the resource classification.

resolution_path: Request organization access or promote only through an approved namespace workflow.
